question: How many friends does each student have?
gold_sql: SELECT student_id ,  count(*) FROM Friend GROUP BY student_id
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.nm, COUNT(T2.frie_id) FROM highschooler AS T1 LEFT JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.stud_id GROUP BY T1.id
raw_response: SELECT T1.nm, COUNT(T2.frie_id) FROM highschooler AS T1 LEFT JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.stud_id GROUP BY T1.id
